The '''Garang spaceport''' was a small [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] servicing the city of [[Garang]] on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] during the latter part of the [[Jedi Civil War]].

==History==
Constructed within the city of [[Garang]] on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]], this spaceport was home to a small sub-orbital shipping business owned and operated by [[Rickard Lusoff]] and [[Calder Nettic]] for over 20 years; it was rumored by [[Handon Guld]] that either Nettic, Lusoff, or both had dealings with the [[Unidentified Hutt (Dantooine)|Hutts]]. At some point Lusoff had accused Calder of cheating him in a business deal which ended violently. The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Tooka (Jedi)|Tooka]] was dispatched from the nearby [[Jedi Enclave]] to restore order and end the conflict.<ref name="KOTOR" />
